article.t-attf-class: {{props.class}} {{props.color ? `o_colorlist_item_color_transparent_${props.color}` : ''}} product position-relative btn btn-light d-flex align-items-stretch p-0 rounded-3 text-start cursor-pointer {{ props.imgUrl ? 'd-flex align-items-stretch' : ''}}

div.class: product-information-tag position-absolute top-0 end-0 z-2 w-0 h-0 rounded-end-2 text-white text-center
product-content d-flex h-100 my-1 px-2 rounded-bottom-3 flex-shrink-1
